overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving along a multi-lane highway through a futuristic urban commercial district. The scene features towering buildings with large digital billboards including a prominent SAMURAI poster, rocky hillsides with sparse vegetation, and moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles under clear midday skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with commercial billboards on right

events.description: red sports car overtakes on the right side at high speed
yellow taxi passes by in the right lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the right lane of the highway, approaching a commercial district with large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: futuristic red sports car overtaking the ego vehicle on the right
oncoming traffic visible in the distance on the left side of the highway

entered.detail: tall futuristic building covered with large digital billboards including a prominent purple SAMURAI poster and yellow advertisements
steep rocky terrain with sparse green vegetation running parallel to the highway
metal guardrail separating the highway from the rocky hillside
horizontal traffic light and sign structure spanning across the highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a multi-lane highway cutting through a futuristic city. On the right, a massive commercial building covered in vibrant digital billboards dominates the view, while a rocky hillside with guardrail lines the left. The ego vehicle drives steadily in the right lane as other futuristic vehicles pass by, including a red sports car that overtakes on the right.

events.description: passing under the overhead traffic light structure
purple pickup truck enters the frame ahead in the same lane

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway through moderate traffic, maintaining speed while approaching the city center

notable_agents.action: purple pickup truck driving ahead in the same lane, gradually getting closer
silver sedan overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: distinctive pyramid-shaped skyscraper with digital displays visible in the distance ahead, marking the city center

segments.scene_description: As the vehicle passes under the overhead traffic structure, the commercial building with billboards recedes behind, and a distinctive pyramid-shaped tower becomes visible in the distance ahead. The highway continues through moderate traffic with various futuristic vehicles, including a purple pickup truck ahead and a silver sedan overtaking on the right. The rocky hillside remains visible on the left but appears further away as the road stretches toward the downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: divided highway approach to city center with dense traffic

events.description: camera vehicle shifts from right lane to left lane, revealing the divided highway and oncoming traffic
passing a line of slower vehicles in the right lane while maintaining left lane position

agents.ego_description: driving in the left lane, providing a wider view of the divided highway with dense traffic in both directions while approaching the downtown area

notable_agents.action: purple pickup truck now driving alongside in the left lane
multiple vehicles visible in the oncoming lanes separated by the highway median

entered.detail: metal guardrail separating the highway lanes from the oncoming traffic lanes
multiple lanes of traffic flowing in the opposite direction, now visible due to the camera's leftward position

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts to the left lane, revealing the full width of the divided highway with a metal median barrier and oncoming traffic visible on the right. The pyramid tower looms larger in the center view as the vehicle approaches the city center. The left side shows a rocky hillside with moderate vegetation, while various futuristic vehicles populate both sides of the highway, including a purple pickup truck now alongside in the left lane.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a multi-lane highway that transitions from a commercial district dominated by digital billboards toward the towering architecture of the city center. It begins with the vehicle cruising past a massive commercial building covered in vibrant advertisements on the right and a rocky hillside on the left, while a red sports car overtakes the ego vehicle. As the camera passes under an overhead traffic structure, the billboards recede and the view opens up to reveal a distinctive pyramid-shaped tower looming in the distance. The scene then shifts as the vehicle moves into the left lane, bringing a purple pickup truck alongside and exposing the full width of the divided highway and its metal median. Finally, the rocky hillside with sparse vegetation persists on the left as the vehicle approaches the city center, with the pyramid tower growing larger in the central frame.
